# Circuit Breaker

> Circuit Breaker is a browser-playable cyberpunk block-stacker with a five-stage Boss Rush mode.

## Canonical resource

- [Play Circuit Breaker](https://cb.correax.com/): Start the game, review the controls, and play Boss Rush in a modern browser.

## Published facts

- The game uses seven tetrominoes, SRS rotation, a seven-bag randomizer, hold, ghost preview, and a local high score.
- Boss Rush contains five rogue-AI encounters with distinct attack patterns.
- Music and sound effects are synthesized in the browser with the Web Audio API.
- Scores, volume preferences, and mute state remain in the visitor's browser and are not sent to the CorreaX tracker.
- Source code is available from the [Circuit Breaker repository](https://github.com/fabioc-aloha/circuit-breaker).
